Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 4 23 0 5 1 25 25}The food here is delicious.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 3 -1 -1 0 0}Um, I want to ask you something...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 4 23 0 5 0 25 25}A-And I'd like you to answer honestly...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}...interested in anyone?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 3 -1 -1 0 0}O-Oh, never mind... Please forget I said anything.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Mitsuru seems a little sad...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I feel like we didn't get any closer today...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 4 -1 -1 1 0}O-Oh, never mind... Please forget I said anything.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Mitsuru is mumbling to herself...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I learned a little more about her today.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 4 -1 -1 0 0}Wh-What's with the smile!?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Mitsuru looks flustered.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I feel like we became a lot closer today.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 3 -1 -1 0 0}I really wanted to try asking for a "second helping" while we're here, but...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 4 23 0 5 0 25 25}I'm a little overwhelmed right now, so you should ask for seconds in my stead.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I ate until my stomach felt like it'd explode[n]before heading back to the dorm.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 4 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4124 0 0}So this is one of Wakatsu's meals. I can see why it's so popular.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 4 23 0 5 0 25 25}Mmm... The smell of freshly fried food only makes it look even more delicious.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}Um, could I ask you something?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4059 0 0}Why did they give us this lemon on the side? I don't suppose it's dessert...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_016_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 4 -1 -1 0 0}I see... The acidity of the lemon juice provides a nice contrast to the fried food, enhancing the flavor.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 4 -1 -1 0 0}How sensible! Everything you need is provided on this one plate![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_017_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Mitsuru seems to be having fun.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I feel like we became a lot closer today.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_018_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}Then why include it? Is it for dessert, after all?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}Oh well, I suppose it doesn't matter. Let's just eat.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_019_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Mitsuru is talking to herself...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I feel like we didn't get any closer today...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_020_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 4 -1 -1 0 0}So I was right? But I imagine it'd be far too sour...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 4 -1 -1 0 0}No, wait... Eating fried food may lead to heartburn, so perhaps this lemon is meant for cleansing your palate after a meal...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_021_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Mitsuru's eyes are sparkling[n]with excitement...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I learned a little more about her today.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_022_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4001 0 0}I also wanted to try asking for a "second helping" while we're here...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}Can you show me how it's done by ordering seconds for yourself?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_023_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I ate until I was stuffed and[n]returned to the dorm.[n]{f 1 1}
